positive: A stylized, maximalist neon vaporwave tropical jungle pattern featuring silhouettes of flamingos, palm fronds, and exotic flowers. The color palette should be vibrant cyan, electric pink, deep indigo, and lime green. High contrast, perfect for repeating textile print. Composition must be tightly packed and visually energetic, forming a continuous, symmetrical pattern around a central axis. Flat graphic style mixed with glowing neon luminescence. Mid-century modern graphic design influence. Vector illustration quality, clean lines, isolated on a white or transparent background.
negative: low quality, blurry, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, jpeg artifacts, low contrast, photorealistic, gradient, bokeh, realistic lighting
